recommendations.title: Free Fire
recommendations.overview: Set in Boston in 1978, a meeting in a deserted warehouse between two gangs turns into a shoot-out and a game of survival.

recommendations.title: High-Rise
recommendations.overview: Life for the residents of a tower block begins to run out of control.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Deep Breath
recommendations.genres: TV Movie, Science Fiction, Adventure, Drama
recommendations.overview: The newly-regenerated Doctor arrives in Victorian London, and Clara Oswald struggles to embrace the man he has become. All the while, they reunite with the Paternoster Gang to investigate a series of combustions that have been occurring all around th

recommendations.title: Sightseers
recommendations.overview: Chris wants to show girlfriend Tina his world, but events soon conspire against the couple and their dream caravan holiday takes a very wrong turn.

recommendations.title: Rebecca
recommendations.overview: After a whirlwind romance with a wealthy widower, a naïve bride moves to his family estate but can't escape the haunting shadow of his late wife.

recommendations.title: Kill List
recommendations.overview: Nearly a year after a botched job, a hitman takes a new assignment with the promise of a big payoff for three killings. What starts off as an easy task soon unravels, sending the killer into the heart of darkness.

recommendations.title: A Field in England
recommendations.overview: During the Civil War in 17th-Century England, a small group of deserters flee from a raging battle through an overgrown field. They are captured by an alchemist, who forces the group to aid him in his search to find a hidden treasure that he believes

recommendations.title: In the Earth
recommendations.overview: As a deadly virus ravages the world, Dr. Martin Lowery embarks on a mission to reach test site ATU327A, a research hub deep in the Arboreal Forest. The arduous journey, guided by park scout Alma, is set back by a nighttime attack that leaves the two

recommendations.title: Superdeep
recommendations.overview: In 1984, a Russian research team goes below the surface to find out what secret the world's deepest borehole is hiding. On their expedition, something unexpectedly gruesome awaits the researchers.

recommendations.title: Survive
recommendations.overview: A couple celebrates their son’s birthday in the middle of the ocean on their boat. A violent storm hits and it brings up hungry creatures from the depths and they fight for their survival.
